main.description: Get details for a space, including its configuration. Must be called on the space owner's PDS. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

isOwner.description: Whether the authenticated user is the owner of the space.

isPublic.description: If true, the credential mint is open to anyone and the member list is bypassed for read/sync access.

managingApp.description: Service identifier (e.g. did:web:example.com#forum) of the application that manages this space. Used to route application-level requests (join requests, invite flows, etc.). Omitted when not configured or not implemented by the host.

appAccessMode.description: Default app-level access policy. 'allow' means any app may sync (with optional denylist via appExceptions), 'deny' means only apps in appExceptions may sync. Omitted when not implemented by the host.

appExceptions.description: Apps that break from the default appAccessMode. Functions as denylist when appAccessMode is 'allow', allowlist when appAccessMode is 'deny'. Omitted when not implemented by the host.
